data.title: Remote SSH
data.notes: Run remote commands or scripts over SSH.

params.title: SSH Hostname
params.caption: Remote hostname or IP address, e.g. `deploy.example.com` or `10.0.0.25`.

params.title: Host Fingerprint
params.caption: Optional host key pin. Accepts `SHA256:...` or MD5 fingerprint text. Recommended for production.

params.title: Connect Timeout (sec)
params.caption: How long to wait for the SSH session to connect.

params.title: Remote Env
params.caption: Optional extra key/value pairs to send to the remote side.

params.title: Verbose Logging
params.caption: Log SSH connection details to the job log.

tools.title: Pipe Script to STDIN
tools.description: Export env vars remotely and pipe your script into the selected command.

fields.title: Remote Command
fields.caption: Command to execute remotely. It will receive the script on STDIN.

fields.title: Script Source
fields.caption: Script contents to pipe into the remote command.

tools.title: Pipe Full Job JSON
tools.description: Send the full xyOps job JSON to a remote program that knows how to read STDIN and optionally emit XYWP.

fields.title: Remote Command
fields.caption: Command to execute remotely. It will receive the full job JSON on STDIN.
